hooks.command: HOOK_ROOT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ ! -x "$HOOK_ROOT/hooks/run-hook.sh" ]; then CANDIDATE="${LLM_OBSIDIAN_PROJECT_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}}"; if [ -x "$CANDIDATE/hooks/run-hook.sh" ] && [ -f "$CANDIDATE/.claude-plugin/plugin.json" ] && [ -f "$CANDIDATE/scripts/vault-write.py" ] && [ -d "$CANDIDATE/wiki" ]; then HOOK_ROOT="$CANDIDATE"; else HOOK_ROOT=""; fi; fi; [ -x "$HOOK_ROOT/hooks/run-hook.sh" ] && PLUGIN_ROOT="$HOOK_ROOT" CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT="$HOOK_ROOT" "$HOOK_ROOT/hooks/run-hook.sh" router || true

HOOK_ROOT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ ! -x "$HOOK_ROOT/hooks/run-hook.sh" ]; then CANDIDATE="${LLM_OBSIDIAN_PROJECT_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}}"; if [ -x "$CANDIDATE/hooks/run-hook.sh" ] && [ -f "$CANDIDATE/.claude-plugin/plugin.json" ] && [ -f "$CANDIDATE/scripts/vault-write.py" ] && [ -d "$CANDIDATE/wiki" ]; then HOOK_ROOT="$CANDIDATE"; else HOOK_ROOT=""; fi; fi; [ -x "$HOOK_ROOT/hooks/run-hook.sh" ] && PLUGIN_ROOT="$HOOK_ROOT" CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT="$HOOK_ROOT" "$HOOK_ROOT/hooks/run-hook.sh" command-capture || true
